prompt: Hook visual: What if a tiny change could ripple through an entire ecosystem?
Context visual: This is called a trophic cascade. It’s when the removal or addition of a predator affects multiple levels of the food ch
Escalation visual: Imagine wolves in Yellowstone. Removing them led to too many deer, which overgrazed, harming plant life.
Evidence visual: This concept shows how interconnected nature is. A single species can shape entire ecosystems.
